channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: TMC - Defects -CW6 Potholes problem, 24th April
item.description:
Pothole CW 300x400x43mm Road closure (CW6 Pothole)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Other FW6 Surface problem, 24th April
item.description:

item.title: Path overgrown with grass, 24th April
item.description:
Grass is overgrowing the paths (between the houses), making it slippery to walk on when wet.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Abbotswood Road, Brockworth, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Other damage to pavement i.e. cobbles, raised mound/surface

item.title: Fridge Freezer on pavement, 24th April
item.description:
There has been a fridge freezer left on the public footpath.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Green Bank, Brockworth, Tewkesbury

item.title: Off Plumb wall along walkway, 24th April
item.description:
///fluid.finely.appear Brick wall along Honeybourne path is off plumb and cracking. Near end of pathway close to Christchurch School/malvern Road.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Honeybourne, Hatherley, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet
